properties.name: Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.remark: The former Darrah National Park was denotified and merged into Mukundra Hills TR (2013).

properties.name: Jessore Sloth Bear Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.remark: OSM relation may extend across the Gujarat border; polygon clipped to Rajasthan bounds where applicable.

properties.name: Kailadevi Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.remark: Part of Ranthambore Tiger Reserve buffer.

properties.name: National Chambal Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.district: Dholpur, Karauli, Sawai Madhopur, Kota, Bundi
properties.remark: Trans-state gharial sanctuary shared with Madhya Pradesh and Uttar Pradesh; Rajasthan portion only shown.

properties.name: Ramgarh Vishdhari Wildlife Sanctuary (now core of TR)
properties.remark: Notified as Tiger Reserve in 2022; retained as WLS as well.

properties.name: Sariska Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.remark: Portion of Sariska Tiger Reserve outside the National Park core.

properties.name: Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.remark: Part of Ranthambore Tiger Reserve buffer.

properties.name: Tal Chhapar Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.remark: Famous for wintering blackbuck and grassland raptors.

properties.name: Sitamata Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.remark: OSM boundary not indexed; geometry ships as point pending future mapping.
